bead.title: Cite ddxroot resolution in the operator-surface specs
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The operator-surface design set describes project-scoped storage for runs, attachments, and sessions, but the local paragraphs that introduce those paths need an explicit `ddx-06cbaa90` citation so the DDx root contract is visible at the point of use.

ROOT CAUSE
The relevant paragraphs in `docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-021-operator-prompt-beads-web-write-path.md:147-153`, `docs/helix/02-design/workers-sessions-operator-surface.md:43-49,67`, and `docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-29-artifact-and-run-architecture.md:152-153,230` already describe the path model, but the governing DDx root reference is not consistently attached there.

PROPOSED FIX
Update those three docs to add the `ddx-06cbaa90` citation in the local project-state paragraphs, and add `cli/internal/agent/operator_surface_docs_test.go` with a focused citation guard for those files. Keep the edits strictly to the operator-surface and run-architecture wording.

NON-SCOPE
- No changes to bead semantics.
- No install-topology edits.
- No migration tooling for existing in-tree repos.

Governing deps: `ddx-06cbaa90`.
In-scope files: `docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-021-operator-prompt-beads-web-write-path.md`, `docs/helix/02-design/workers-sessions-operator-surface.md`, `docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-29-artifact-and-run-architecture.md`, `cli/internal/agent/operator_surface_docs_test.go`.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestOperatorSurfaceDocs_CiteDdxRootResolution` exists and verifies `ADR-021`, `workers-sessions-operator-surface.md`, and `plan-2026-04-29-artifact-and-run-architecture.md` each cite `ddx-06cbaa90` in the project-state paragraph.
2. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... ./internal/config/... ./internal/registry/...` passes.
3. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
